targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT zone_id) AS zones, COUNT(*) AS total_predictions
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT ROUND(AVG(pred_confidence)::numeric, 4) AS avg_confidence
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT ROUND(
    AVG(CASE WHEN used_model = 'model_b' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1
) AS fallback_pct
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT window_end) AS windows_processed
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT
    window_end AS "time",
    AVG(pred_confidence) AS avg_confidence,
    COUNT(*) AS zones_predicted
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY window_end
ORDER BY window_end

SELECT
    window_end AS "time",
    AVG(predicted_class) AS avg_predicted_class,
    AVG(pred_confidence) AS avg_confidence
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY window_end
ORDER BY window_end

SELECT
    window_end AS "time",
    AVG(pred_confidence) AS avg_confidence,
    AVG(CASE WHEN used_model = 'model_a' THEN pred_confidence END) AS model_a_confidence,
    AVG(CASE WHEN used_model = 'model_b' THEN pred_confidence END) AS model_b_confidence
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY window_end
ORDER BY window_end

SELECT
    used_model,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
GROUP BY used_model

SELECT
    zone_id,
    predicted_class,
    ROUND(pred_confidence::numeric, 3) AS confidence,
    used_model,
    window_end
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
ORDER BY predicted_class DESC, zone_id

SELECT
    zone_id,
    predicted_class,
    ROUND(pred_confidence::numeric, 3) AS confidence,
    used_model,
    model_version,
    shadow_predicted_class,
    window_end
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
ORDER BY zone_id

SELECT
    zone_id,
    ROUND(AVG(predicted_class)::numeric, 2) AS avg_class,
    ROUND(AVG(pred_confidence)::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence,
    COUNT(*) AS n_slots
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY zone_id
ORDER BY avg_class DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
    window_end AS "time",
    AVG(pred_confidence) AS production_confidence,
    AVG(shadow_proba_0 + shadow_proba_1 + shadow_proba_2 +
        shadow_proba_3 + shadow_proba_4 + shadow_proba_5) AS shadow_total_proba
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '72 hours'
  AND shadow_predicted_class IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY window_end
ORDER BY window_end
